info.name: Saloon Booking API - Complete Collection
info.description:
Complete Postman API Collection for Saloon/Barber Shop Booking Management System.

User Types: CUSTOMER, VENDOR (salon owner), ADMIN, SUPERADMIN

Auth: Firebase OTP → JWT Token (Bearer)

Base URL: http://localhost:3000/api

item.name: 🔐 AUTH
item.description: Authentication APIs - OTP based login/register + legacy login

request.description: Server health check - no auth required

Step 1: Check if user exists. OTP is sent via Firebase on client side.

Returns: user_exists, user_type, user_status

Phone format: E.164 (e.g. +919876543210)

Step 2: Verify OTP and Login OR Register.

For testing use BYPASS_TOKEN_ prefix in firebase_token.

If user doesn't exist → auto-registers.
If user exists → logs in.

Returns: JWT token, user info, is_new_user flag.
Check if phone number is already registered
Legacy: password-based registration (not used in Flutter app)
Legacy: password-based login. Useful for ADMIN/SUPERADMIN who don't use OTP.
Get logged-in user's profile. Auth required.
Clears device_id so old JWT is invalidated on next request.

item.name: 👤 CUSTOMER
item.description: All Customer APIs. Requires CUSTOMER JWT token.

request.description: Returns: total_bookings, completed, upcoming, cancelled counts + upcoming appointments + favourite vendors
List all approved shops. Can add ?city=Pune or ?search=haircut filters.
Full shop details: info, services, images, ratings, operating hours
Get available 30-min slots for a shop on given date considering existing bookings, holidays, early closures, and operating hours.

Create a new booking. service_ids = array of service IDs from the shop.

booking_time: HH:MM format (24-hour)

payment_method: cash | online | upi
Add review for a completed booking. One review per booking allowed. Rating: 1-5.
Replace 'haircut' with the category name
Update Firebase Cloud Messaging token for push notifications

item.name: 🏪 VENDOR
item.description: All Vendor APIs. Requires VENDOR JWT token.

request.description: Full vendor profile: personal info + shop details + metrics (ratings, bookings, revenue)

body.raw:
{
  "shop_name": "Style Hub Salon",
  "shop_address": "123 MG Road, Near Bus Stand",
  "city": "Nagpur",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "latitude": 21.1458,
  "longitude": 79.0882,
  "open_time": "09:00",
  "close_time": "20:00",
  "break_start_time": "13:00",
  "break_end_time": "14:00",
  "weekly_holiday": "Sunday",
  "no_of_seats": 3,
  "no_of_workers": 3,
  "business_license": "LIC123456",
  "tax_number": "GST29ABCDE1234F1Z5",
  "bank_account_number": "1234567890",
  "bank_ifsc_code": "SBIN0001234"
}

request.description: Create shop on first time. Use PUT to update. Shop status starts as 'pending' until admin approves.

type: 'holiday' (full day off) OR 'closure' (early closing time)

Holiday → stored in vendor_holidays table
Closure → stored in vendor_early_closures table
Upload main profile image for the shop. Form-data with 'image' key.
Upload multiple shop gallery images. Can send multiple 'images' files.
Replace '1' with document_id of the image
Get all documents (license, id_proof, etc.)
Returns: total revenue, bookings count, ratings, today's schedule, recent bookings
List of all services from services_master table. Use to pick services to add to shop.
Enable/disable a service temporarily without deleting it.
Create booking for walk-in customers (no app needed). Vendor creates booking on behalf of customer.
Mark customer as no-show when they don't arrive at appointment time

item.name: 👑 ADMIN
item.description: Admin/SuperAdmin APIs. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN JWT token.

request.description: Platform overview: total users, vendors, bookings, revenue
Only SUPERADMIN can create ADMIN accounts.
Admin approves or rejects a vendor's shop. Vendor gets notification via FCM.
